shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "react-hook-form disabled setValue shouldDirty dirty tracking" --limit 5'
/bin/bash -lc 'git status --short && rg -n "shouldDirty|isDirty|dirtyFields|disabled" src/logic src/useForm.ts src | head -240'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '200,340p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '420,490p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '830,955p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1260,1300p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts"
/bin/bash -lc "git diff -- src/logic/createFormControl.ts && sed -n '210,230p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts && sed -n '435,450p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts"

/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/logic/createFormControl.ts src/useForm.ts src/__tests__/useForm/formState.test.tsx && node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --pretty false'
/bin/bash -lc "git status --short && git diff --check && cat package.json | sed -n '1,100p'"

/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/prettier --config .prettierrc --write src/logic/createFormControl.ts src/useForm.ts src/__tests__/useForm/formState.test.tsx && node_modules/.bin/eslint src/logic/createFormControl.ts src/useForm.ts src/__tests__/useForm/formState.test.tsx'
/bin/bash -lc "git diff -- src/logic/createFormControl.ts src/useForm.ts | sed -n '1,160p'; git status --short"
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "disabled form explicit setValue shouldDirty react-hook-form" --limit 5'

/bin/bash -lc "nmem --json m add \"In react-hook-form, disabled forms must still honor explicit setValue(name, value, { shouldDirty: true }) requests. The dirty update path should be entered when shouldDirty is true even if the form is disabled; _getDirty must compare values without a disabled guard, while useForm's background isDirty recomputation must remain disabled-gated so ordinary disabled user interaction does not create or erase dirty state. Regression coverage verifies getFieldState(name).isDirty, formState.isDirty, and dirtyFields become dirty for a changed value and return pristine when set back to the default. Focused formState Jest (36 tests), TypeScript, ESLint, and diff checks pass.\" -t \"Disabled forms honor explicit programmatic dirty tracking\" --unit-type learning -l react-hook-form -l dirty-tracking -s codex -i 0.8"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
